figures.caption: Figure 3: TREC DL2020 nDCG@10 results between 2021 and 2025. Empty circles show baselines, full circles best results.
Figure 2: Robust04 nDCG@10 results between 2021 and 2025. Empty circles show baselines, full circles best results.

Figure 1: Robust04 MAP results between 2005 and 2025. Regression lines show trends based on best reported results. Empty circles and diamonds show reported baselines, full circles and diamonds best reported results.

Table 1: Comparison of RankZephyr and RankGPT on DL2020 Passage Retrieval and Robust04. PC = full (potentially contaminated) test set, NC = non-contaminated topics only. Scores outside of CIs are marked with †.
